case_title: ALYSSA PALMIRA BANCHERO VS. WILMAR DIAS DE OLIVEIRA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $00.0 SERVED OCT-24-2024, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT DIAS DE OLIVEIRA, WILMAR
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BANCHERO, ALYSSA PALMIRA AS TO DEFENDANT DIAS DE OLIVEIRA, WILMAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2024 - CONTINUED FOR INTERPRETER TO JAN-10-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ALYSSA PALMIRSA BANCHERO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILMAR DIAS DE OLIVEIRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REQUESTS A PORTUGUESE INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOSEPH HURLEY; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-10-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-10-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE. PLAINTIFF ALYSSA PALMIRA BANCHERO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILMAR DIAS DE OLIVEIRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS ASSISTED BY PORTUGUESE INTERPRETER STELLA HECHT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF ALYSSA PALMIRA BANCHERO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILMAR DIAS DE OLIVEIRA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS ASSISTED BY PORTUGUESE INTERPRETER STELLA HECHT. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO SHOW PROOF OF OWNERSHIP OF THE VEHICLE AND AGREED TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
